# Getting Help

## GitHub Issues (bugs and feature requests)

[File an issue](https://github.com/prophetse7en/purgebot/issues/new/choose) if you hit a reproducible problem or want to propose a feature. Please use the templates - they ask for the version, retention config, and reproduction steps that make a fix possible.

For security bugs, use [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/prophetse7en/purgebot/security/advisories/new) instead - see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).

## Documentation

- [README](../README.md) - install, features, configuration
- [CHANGELOG](../CHANGELOG.md) - what's new per release
- [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) - auth posture, audit log, supported versions, disclosure channel

## Discord

PurgeBot does not have a dedicated Discord channel yet. If you maintain a relevant community space and want to host one, open an issue and we'll link it here.
